title: cyclosorus firmulus
intro: Cyclosorus firmulus, also known as Chinese water shield, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Araceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus firmulus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be dried for later use in herbal remedies.
